summary: Verified the static production build at /app/docs served via http://127.0.0.1:4173. All 9 requested checks passed: page renders InvitationPage (not README), light theme background rgb(245,245,245), H1 'LEVEL 10 UNLOCKED', matter.js physics-hero canvas rendered, RSVP form has correct inputs (name/yes/no/guests/submit) and no notes-textarea, schedule tiles show 12:00 PM / 12:30 PM / 1:00 PM, Gravity Override toggle cycles between '0-G' and 'ON', RSVP submit calls window.open with https://wa.me/919980011330?text=... containing 'TestUser', 'Yes — Accepting', 'Total Guests: 2', and no 404s on /static/js or /static/css assets (relative homepage='.' paths resolve correctly).
critical_code_review_comments: Build looks GitHub Pages ready: relative asset paths (./static/...) present in /app/docs/index.html, HashRouter used so root path renders InvitationPage.
Emergent PostHog analytics script is embedded in the built index.html — acceptable for GitHub Pages but may be noise if you want a fully offline invitation.
Physics canvas mounts synchronously with matter.js — could gate on prefers-reduced-motion (minor a11y consideration, not blocking).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static server was already running at http://127.0.0.1:4173 (python http.server serving /app/docs). All 9 build-verification checks in the review request passed. Guests select is a native <select> element (used select_option with value '2'). WhatsApp URL uses the em-dash character (—) in 'Yes — Accepting Invitation'.
rca of the issue: No issues found. Build output at /app/docs is production-ready for GitHub Pages 'main /docs' deployment.
